text: What if bricks could grow like plants? Meet biobricks—a sustainable alternative made from living organisms. These bricks can self-repair, reducing waste and energy costs! Scientists are experimenting, but results vary. Success is not guaranteed. If perfected, biobricks could revolutionize construction and combat climate change. Interested in the future of building? Like and follow for more science insights!
